svg.text: Red Hat Components View — Private AI Code Assistant
Red Hat OpenShift Container Platform (ROSA HCP 4.21)
Neuron DRA driver allocates NeuronDevices via CDI injection
All pods serve: Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct-FP8 — EPP treats as unified pool
Manages installation, updates, and dependency resolution for all cluster operators via OperatorHub
GPU metrics (DCGM) · Neuron metrics (neuron-monitor) · vLLM request metrics · Pod resource usage
etcd · kube-apiserver · kube-controller-manager · Kubernetes v1.34 · Hosted in Red Hat AWS account
1× L40S GPU · 48 GB VRAM · FP8/BF16 · CUDA 12
Node Taints: aws.amazon.com/neuroncore=present:NoSchedule (Inferentia/Trainium) · nvidia.com/gpu=present:NoSchedule (NVIDIA) — Tolerations on model pods
NVMe Instance Store (trn1.32xlarge): 4× 1.9 TB local SSD mounted at /var/mnt/nvme-scratch for NEFF compilation temp files · Prevents EBS disk pressure
Private AI Code Assistant · Red Hat OpenShift (ROSA HCP 4.21) on AWS · Multi-Accelerator Inference
